title: Zcash Foundation releases first stable, audited version of Zebra
contentSnippet: Zebra is an alternative Zcash node implementation that has been written in entirely in RUST. It can be used to join the Zcash peer-to-peer network, validate and broadcast transactions, and maintain the Zcash blockchain state in a distributed manner.

title: In praise of Mymensingh’s Bangla folk ballads
Fizz takes three in Mumbai rout
As internal divisions simmer, Lebanese see echoes of civil war
contentSnippet: Veterans of the 1975–1990 civil war warn of rising sectarian tensions, mass displacement and political fractures as fragile ceasefire leaves key issues unresolved.

title: US assistant secretary wraps up Nepal visit with focus on investment and tech ties
contentSnippet: Samir Paul Kapur meets top leaders, pushes for stronger investment climate and expands talks on trade, ICT and policy reforms.

title: Woman dies during abortion in Butwal; family alleges negligence
contentSnippet: Police detain three clinic operators as investigation begins.

title: Weakened, Nepal’s old guard turns inward
contentSnippet: Congress, UML and other forces scramble to rebuild organisations, review leadership and prepare for local and provincial polls as new political order takes shape.

title: Nagdhunga–Sisnekhola tunnel road near completion, opening hinges on operation deal
contentSnippet: With 98 percent of work done, authorities expect full operations within three months as staffing, safety systems and toll infrastructure are finalised.

title: Poetic Diaspora discussed at Hattiban literary event
contentSnippet: Critics highlight depth, language, and spiritual themes in Anusha Sharma Subedi’s English poetry collection.

title: US announces ceasefire extension with Iran
contentSnippet: Trump said he would extend the ceasefire until Iran’s “proposal is submitted, and discussions are concluded, one way or the other.”

title: When memory becomes more vivid than the present
contentSnippet: ‘Once We Were Us’ traces the emotional arc of two former lovers who meet again after a decade, only to find that time has softened memories but sharpened regret.

title: Act targets bullying in the workplace
Mexican pyramid gunman had materials tied to Columbine shooting, officials say
contentSnippet: A 27-year-old suspect who opened fire at the Teotihuacan archaeological site possessed material related to the Columbine school shooting in the United States, Mexican authorities said.
